[[Galactic Electronics]] Corporation employed [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] '''''GEC U47''''' at their primary research [[XQ2 Platform|facility]] ''[[Pondut]]'' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ''GEC U47''{{'s}} job was to run cargo transfers between the containers and the station. After the discovery of [[Mag-pulse warhead/Legends|Mag-pulse Torpedoes]] aboard [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] derived Galactic Electronics as the supplier. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] raided the facility, stripping it of all resources, and capturing ''GEC U47'' in the process.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
